description: Web Assessment scan-finding row — 'five agencies in one' (CRO, SEO, funnel, email, social) on one weekly cadence. Modeled on the comms/CIP channel-finding shape: one row = one channel finding from a web-surface scan. Structural + format validation; scan execution + scoring + ready-to-post content live in the assessment application layer.

url.pattern_message: url must start with http:// or https://
url.fix: Serve the surface over https:// (or http://) - other schemes are not scannable.

plan.pattern_message: plan must be Starter, Standard, or Professional
plan.fix: Use one of: Starter, Standard, Professional.

channel.pattern_message: channel must be one of: cro, seo, funnel, email, social
channel.fix: Map to the closest Web Assessment channel: cro, seo, funnel, email, social (e.g. payment-flow -> cro, deliverability -> email).

severity.pattern_message: finding severity must be ok, warn, or issue
severity.fix: Map to the scale: ok, warn or issue (e.g. critical -> issue).

status.pattern_message: job status must be pending, running, done, or failed
status.fix: Use one of: pending, running, done, failed.
